title: National Cadet Corps (NCC) Trainer
description:
Job Summary

You will conduct Train-the-Trainer workshops for NCC Cadet Leaders (Secondary school students) in schools or at HQ NCC, teaching essential military skills and supporting NCC Teacher Officers in supervising and guiding cadet training activities.

Responsibilities

  • Deliver Train-the-Trainer workshops to NCC Cadet Leaders on basic drills to develop their foundational military skills
  • Teach navigation and orienteering skills including compass use, map reading, map setting, pacing, and point-to-point navigation to enhance cadet leadership capabilities
  • Instruct individual fieldcraft techniques such as hand signals, cover and concealment, tactical movement, and basha tent setup to prepare cadets for field operations
  • Train cadet leaders in basic Close Quarter Battle (CQB) techniques for urban combat scenarios to improve their tactical readiness
  • Support NCC Teacher Officers by supervising Cadet Leaders during drills, navigation, fieldcraft, and CQB lessons to ensure safety and correct instructional methods
  • Advise NCC Teacher Officers on basic drills and military-related parade and ceremony procedures when needed to maintain training standards

Required competencies and certifications

  • Demonstrate knowledge of basic soldier fundamentals including drills, land navigation, individual fieldcraft, and urban operations gained from former SAF service
  • Maintain physical fitness to perform training and supervisory duties effectively
  • Proficiency to communicate instructions clearly
  • Vetting and approval from the respective SAF Services is required

Other Information:

  • Contract Period: 1 Feb 2026 to 30 Nov 2026
  • $35/hour

Deployment:
For deployment to assigned schools: 4 hours in the afternoon, on any 2 weekday per week during school term
For centralised courses in HQ NCC: up to 8 hours, on a weekday

EA License No: 96C4864
Reg. No.: R24121728 EUNICE WOO JING QI
